title: Robin Wants to Live — Part 5
description: Robin finally admits she wants to live, giving the Straw Hats the answer they needed to fight for her openly.
scene: Across pages 16, 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. Robin finally admits she wants to live, giving the Straw Hats the answer they needed to fight for her openly.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah... yer a devil fruit user, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I've been to Da Grand Line,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And I've seen amazing devil fruit users.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's still a funny way to laugh.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If ya keep Laffin', Y"can be happy!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Why? ya Laff when yer havin' fun.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It won't be like dat, DERESHISH!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: West Blue, Somewhere on the Sea.

summary: Robin finally admits she wants to live, giving the Straw Hats the answer they needed to fight for her openly.
